feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cost element change or delete
entry.content: I must delete a cost element in SAP and make a virement record. Then I will assign the cost element again from the kah2-cost element group. Will this cause a problem? Can you inform me? Thank you.

entry.title: Help Needed: BAPI for Updating Custom Fields in RFQ
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’ve added custom fields at both the header (EKKO) and item (EKPO) levels for RFQs in transactions ME41, ME42, and ME43. Via Standard T-code, it is getting update.

Could anyone advise which BAPI should be used to update these custom fields? I tried almost everything.

Thanks in advance for your assistance!

Best regards,

entry.title: vk11/vk12，BTE - Pricing Condition maintenance
entry.content:
Hi All,

Now we hope that when the user changes the conditions in VK12, Also maintain processing status.

I used BTE-00503305, this is the current code

 

 

IF konp_i-kschl = 'ZPR0' AND komg_i-vkorg = '0003'.
    SELECT SINGLE *
      FROM konp
      WHERE knumh = @konp_i-knumh
      INTO (lt).
    IF lt <> konp_i.
        IF fieldname = 'KBSTAT'.
          CLEAR check_field.
          CHECK komg_i-kbstat IS INITIAL.
          returncode = 4.
          MESSAGE e001(00) WITH 'Please enter processing status!'.
          EXIT.
        ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

 

 

What I have a problem with is the Fieldname, which is a parameter in BTE,

this is the description in the long text of the system

  • FIELDNAME
    Name of characteristic field for which a check is carried out. The field is contained in structure KOMG

However, KBSTAT will not appear in FIELDNAME in debug unless I changed KBSTAT this time.

I'm not sure why it usually stops at MATNR, VKORG, etc.

*Update>> This controlled at VK11, it can be triggered normally*

 

The second question is about message, There is a note in the long text of system,

 

 

Note: 
If you implement your own check, you should not issue an own error message. The function module is also called during background runs, these are interrupted abruptly by error messages. The calling program treats the RETURNCODE correspondingly, and creates either an error message, or transfers an error code to the calling program. If several USER-Exits are being used, the output of a RETURNCODE not equal to 0 surpresses the processing of subsequently assigned USER-Exits.

 

 

 Does this mean I shouldn't use custom messages? So how should I restrict users?

 

If you have any questions about the above description, please reply and ask.

Hope anybody can help. Thank you!

entry.title: Error 00309 SM35
entry.content:
Hello.
During the processing of a file via SM35 there was a system failure leaving the status of in processing, it is necessary to complete the processing completely as only part of the items were registered. When trying to reprocess, message 00309 is returned. 
Best Regards 
Nadir

entry.title: Hardware Key Error
entry.content: I have a error in SUM, SAP don't take the Hardware Key

entry.title: Automatic Batch in MIGO Good receipt for a specific material type
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

I have a requerement to generate a batch automatically in MIGO for a specific material Type ZEM2 (for other material Type, No need to generate as we will use the supplier batch)
Is there any way to do that in SAP S/4HANA

I tried to 

1- Activate the batch generation in 

SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Logistics - General -> Batch Management -> Batch Number Assignment -> Activate Internal Batch Number Assignment ----> Activate Batch Number Assignment (Actif)

2- SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Logistics - General -> Batch Management -> Creation of New Batches -> Define Initial Creation for Batch Master Maintenance    and choose "C : Automatic no manuel creation" 

When I tried that, in MIGO Good receipt, the batch is generated for all of the material types and not only the ZEM2

Could you please help me with this issue

Thank you

entry.title: Oracle HA Setup - Application Instance connectivity
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have configured the Oracle Dataguard on our SAP DB (19c). We are able to see the sync is happening between both Primary and Standby.

Primary Server Virtual Name : 

Standby Server Virtual Name : 

Problem : In Default Profile, we have maintained the parameter "SAPDBHOST=".

So when we do the failover of DB(Primary --> Standby). After the Failover my Standby becomes Primary. But in Default Profile (--> earlier primary server) is maintained. so application will fail to connect to DB.

 

So we want to know How can we define one unique name (dbSID) which always points to Primary DB (whether it is 00 or 01 node) ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatic Batch number assignment for serialized materials in REM
entry.content:
Hello Everyone

I have a scenario where I need to generate automatic batch numbers . The catch is that the materials are already serialized. The type of manufacturing is REM.

When I tried to configure this scenario I receive a standard SAP message saying " Serial numbers with automatic batch numbers not supported"


I wanted to explore more about this error message so I tried playing around and I found that 

 If I change the type of manufacturing to Discrete then this error is not shown. This means that the automatic batch number for serialized materials does work for discrete manufacturing .

I need help finding answers to the below questions

(1) I wonder why SAP didn't allow this scenario for REM ?

(2) What is the solution if I want to configure this scenario in REM. I tried using exits EXIT_SAPLBARM_001,EXIT_SAPLBARM_002,EXIT_SAPLBARM_003, EXIT_SAPLV01Z_001 but I didn't found them to be useful

Regards
Karan

entry.title: PR Release procedure with cost center
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert, 

I have a requirement to have PR workflow via Cost center, I'm using the old release procedure and not the --flexible workflow

the issue is tha the release is not triggred when I create PR

TE CLASSIF : 

THE CARACTERISTIC  Cost center 

CL24N

--> I wanted to check if my config is correct, so I remove the cost center from my classification and did a PR without cost center and the release is triggred so the release is configured correctely, 

Could you please tell me what did I miss ? 

I can't use the flexible workflow since we dont have HR module (to create the approuvers as Employee) and it can be complicated to use and Iam not sure if it's going to work for cost center or not, ... but if it's the only solution I can switch to flexible

entry.title: Supported SAP ECC Edge Services for Azure?
entry.content:
Hello - we are migrating our on-premise SAP ECC 6 system from an on-premise data center to MS Azure.  Are there any supported edge solutions to reduce latency for users that are geographically near the original on-premise data center?

Like an Azure Stack Edge, or the like?

entry.title: Extract Customer Master record from SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there a method to retrieve the customer ID using either the customer's telephone number or their name in ECC?

entry.title: Questions about locked/expired users
entry.content:
Hello everyone!
I am a beginner in SAP and I would like to ask you three questions:
1 - Can an SAP user with an expired account due to a defined user validity account (GLTGB) log on to the system?
2 - Is there any note from SAP about good practices to lock users even if there is an previous validity date on the account?
3 - Is there any SAP manual that mentions the validity of users and the impossibility of accessing the system with an expired account?

entry.title: Reason for mouvement not showing in MIGO Good Issue
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert, 

I have a business requirement to make the reason for mouvement mandatory for Good issue (201) in Migo

1- SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Materials Management -> Inventory Management and Physical Inventory -> Movement Types -> Record Reason for Goods Movements  : I Mantianed the mouvement reasons and made the reason control  mandatory but the reason is not showing  (I made the same config for Mvt 122 , and 161 and it's working fine just the 201 is not working)

entry.title: Create new data provider for Funds Management Reconciliation
entry.content:
I'm building a Reconciliation Rule (FMFGRCN_DEF_RULE) for Funds Management. 

However, the listed providers for Data Slices do not have Profit Centre as a field for data selection.

Is it possible to add a field in a existing data provider? If not, how do I create a new data provider?

entry.title: gross weight scale VK11
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I need to set up a price scale based on gross weight in VK11. Imagine that we need to set the shipping fees for sending product by DHL so:

1 KG --> 20 EUR

1,5 KG --> 22 EUR

2 KG --> 24 EUR

And so on.

I'd appreciate any idea or solution. Because I tried but it doesn't work.

Thanks 

Angie C

entry.title: how to assign the FICO Form in the place of standard form
entry.content:
how to assign customised sapscript form in the place of standard one for cash journal in FICO.... can anybody give me the exact solution I tried to assigned it in ob96 and then fbcjc3 but the output in fbcj is standard form only....

can anybody give me the solution for this problem

entry.title: Change revision name of the current revision level for a material
entry.content:
Hi all, do you know if it is possible to change the revision name of the current revision level of a material without changing the revision level itself?  

Thanks,

Diego

entry.title: Customer consignment invoice
entry.content:
Hi

I would like to know if it's possible  to send products to a customer consignment, and then invoice them without mentioning a batch. Which type of order can I use it ?

Thank you

entry.title: EHS OCC settings are grouped differently in Prod and Pre-Prod systems
entry.content:
Hi guys,

We are using EHS OCC to upload regulatory data in several systems (Quality, Pre-prod and Prod) and we are defining a default filter for which data to upload. but the data tree is not shown and grouped same in different systems which makes it difficult to insure same data is uploaded in each system (see below example for product safety data), knowing that the OCC version is the exactly the same in both systems (SP61 and all software components are the same as well).  

Is there anyone of you who has this experience or know if there is any parameter that influence this grouping.

entry.title: Documentation help - CATA and how it posts time/labour costs to a project?
entry.content:
Business requires documentation on CATA and how it posts time/labour costs to a project
